executive_summary: Mumbai operational status is ADVISORY. Partly cloudy sky with possibility of light rain/ thundershower in city and suburbs Temperature 24°C - 28°C. Heavy Rainfall advisory active. No active traffic diversions reported.
business_implication: Minor weather-related disruptions are possible. Monitor local advisories.
